docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MANDL PAUL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $110.00 FILED BY FELDMAN LORI AS TO DEFENDANT MANDL PAUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-16-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $3.27 ACCRUED INTEREST, $3.58 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT MANDL PAUL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FELDMAN LORI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MANDL PAUL $110.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $118.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FELDMAN LORI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MANDL PAUL $110.00 PRINCIPAL, $47.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $157.95, AMENDED AS TO COURT COSTS. NUNC PRO TUNC PER JUDGE COLBERT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
